dialogues.speaker: Shrine Plaque
lines: SNOWBELL SHRINE — RING THE BELLS TO OPEN THE INNER HALL
The ice floor will carry you. Mind the frozen seal ahead.

dialogues.speaker: Frost Acolyte
lines: Three bells guard the inner chamber: north, west, and east.
Ring each one, and the frozen door will yield.
Warm yourself at the brazier before the ice puzzles wear you down.

dialogues.speaker: Frost Acolyte
lines: The bells have spoken. The inner path is open.
Beyond lies the sanctum. Its guardian has not yet awakened.

dialogues.speaker: Inner Sanctum Seal
lines: A great Frost presence sleeps beyond this threshold.
Placeholder: the shrine boss will be faced here in a future trial.

dialogues.speaker: Inner Sanctum Seal
lines: The great presence of this shrine has been calmed.
The Frostveil region is at peace.
